defs.name: Duration
defs.meaning: Follows expressions of time (초, 분, 시간, 며칠, 년 etc), indicating that an action continued throughout a period.

defs.name: Similarity
defs.meaning: Indicates resemblance or a metaphorical comparison in actions or objects

defs.name: Around time or period
defs.meaning: Follows time words like '시,' '분,' '월,' '반,' to express that an event or action occurred around that time.

defs.name: End of range
defs.meaning: Indicate the end of the range of time, place or action.

defs.name: To the Fullest
defs.alt: to one's heart's content, as much as one likes
defs.meaning: to that capacity’s fullest extent.

defs.name: Target
defs.meaning: Define a person or a living creature as the recipient or target of an action. This is the honorific version of 한테 or 에게.

defs.name: Subject marker
defs.meaning: Mark the subject of the sentence. The honorific version of 이/가.

defs.name: Group Together
defs.meaning: Used to indicate that actions or interactions are done among members of the same group or category.

defs.name: Collective
defs.meaning: Shows which group a person is part of

defs.name: Honorific
defs.meaning: An honorific particle designating people, showing them respect and honor.

defs.name: Has all the quality of
defs.meaning: Indicate that it has some of the qualities or characteristics of the noun and turn it into an descriptive verb.

defs.name: For each
defs.meaning: Typically follows measure words, creating a ratio between a measure word and a value. Similar to 마다.

defs.name: Experience Consequence
defs.meaning: To be the -- often helpless -- subject of an action, performed by someone else, that has a negative consequence for the subject.

defs.name: According to
defs.meaning: When added to the end of a noun, it indicates that something is "as" or "in accordance with" the noun.

defs.name: Target person
defs.meaning: Follows a pronoun or title to define a person as the recipient or target of an action. Commonly used with expressions related to speech or conversation.

defs.name: Addition
defs.alt: also, too, as well, and even
defs.meaning: It indicates that the noun is being added to a list of items, actions, or descriptions previously mentioned or understood from the context.

defs.name: To become
defs.alt: passive, to be possible, to work, to go well, to be allowed
defs.meaning: Indicates nouns into passive verbs, things working out, becoming something.

defs.name: Plural marker
defs.meaning: Attached to nouns, pronouns, adverbs, etc. to indicate plurality.

defs.name: Enumeration
defs.meaning: Connects multiple nouns, indicating a list or group without specifying order.

defs.name: Companionship
defs.meaning: Indicates that an action involves more than one party or that something is done together with someone or something else.

defs.name: Method or way
defs.meaning: Expresses the means or tools that enable us to perform an action.

defs.name: Direction
defs.meaning: Used to express a direction.

defs.name: Means or Method
defs.meaning: This form shows how something happens or is done using a certain method or way.

defs.name: Repetition
defs.meaning: When preceded by a temporal indication, it indicates the recurrence of an event.

defs.name: Including all
defs.meaning: Indicates the inclusion of all the elements of a group with no exception.

defs.name: Even this too
defs.alt: On top of that, also to that extent, even the last possible option
defs.meaning: Emphasizes that the additionally included listed item is least expected.

defs.name: Limitation
defs.meaning: A particle that expresses the sense of limitation, emphasis and degree of comparison.

defs.name: As much as
defs.meaning: When added to the end of a noun, it describes something done as much as the noun.

defs.name: Exclusion
defs.alt: except for that, other than that
defs.meaning: Express the only thing or option available, no other possibilities available.

defs.name: Target Person
defs.meaning: Used to indicate the person to whom a question, request, order, etc is directed at. Commonly used in colloquial speech when quoting others.

defs.name: Comparison
defs.meaning: Express that something is more or less than the noun in a certain quality or quantity. Used to directly compare two items.

defs.name: Noun's starting point
defs.meaning: Indicate the starting point of an action, time or place.

defs.name: Action's starting point
defs.meaning: Indicate the starting point of an action, time or place.

defs.name: Nothing more
defs.alt: there is nothing else, it is the only one.
defs.meaning: Used when there is nothing more than the content of the preceding statement or when it is the only one.

defs.name: Has some of the quality of
defs.meaning: Indicate that it has all of the qualities or characteristics of the noun and turn it into an descriptive verb.

defs.name: Order
defs.meaning: Indicates causation or making someone do something.

defs.name: Equally distributed
defs.meaning: Emphasis that something is being done or distributed equally among people or things.

defs.name: Amount that corresponds to that price
defs.meaning: Used to mean the amount that corresponds to that price

defs.name: Time of an action
defs.meaning: Indicates the time of the action. Can be used with days, hours, seasons, etc.

defs.name: Location
defs.meaning: When used with 있다 or 없다, it express the location of a person or thing.

defs.name: Direction
defs.meaning: When used with verbs of movement, it express the direction of the action.

defs.name: Target
defs.meaning: Define a person or a living creature as the recipient or target of an action. This is the formal version of 한테 or 께.

defs.name: Onto / Into
defs.meaning: Shows where something is put or added.

defs.name: Place of action
defs.meaning: Used to indicate where an action occurs or to indicate a reference frame that is considered a point of origin.

defs.name: Enumeration
defs.meaning: Connects multiple nouns, indicating a list or group without specifying order.

defs.name: Companionship
defs.meaning: Indicates that an action involves more than one party or that something is done together with someone or something else.

defs.name: Politeness ending
defs.meaning: Used to indicate respect for the other person, the subject who is shown respect.

defs.name: Short reply
defs.meaning: Used when you have a response related to the question by using '요' as the short answer. A way to reply with just a noun, without having to repeat any of what has just been said. Also written as 이요.

defs.name: Role or Capacity
defs.meaning: Indicates the role, capacity, or status of someone or something in relation to an action or state.

defs.name: Topic marker
defs.meaning: Mark the topic of the sentence

defs.name: Object marker
defs.meaning: The object marker is used to indicate that a noun is the object in a sentence.

defs.name: Relation particle
defs.meaning: Used to express a relationship between two words, which can be expressed as "of" in English. The first noun being the possessor of the second noun.

defs.name: Subject Marker
defs.meaning: Mark the subject of the sentence.

defs.name: Listing choice
defs.meaning: Can be used to list two or more choices and one of them will be chosen. V+거나 is the same but with verbs.

defs.name: Much more than expected
defs.meaning: It expresses that the amount of something is much more than expected or higher than the standard.

defs.name: Not the best choice
defs.meaning: It expresses that the choice is not really one's first choice but it is fine as the second best option.

defs.name: Copula
defs.meaning: Express that the subject and predicate are the same thing.

defs.name: Sufficient choice
defs.meaning: It expresses the speaker's choice of something will suffice even though it may not be the best choice.

defs.name: Pretending to Be
defs.meaning: Expresses that someone is pretending or acting as if something is something, often with a mocking or critical tone.

defs.name: Copula
defs.meaning: Express that the subject and predicate are the same thing.

defs.name: Emphasis
defs.meaning: Particle referring to an emphasis.

defs.name: Prime example
defs.alt: really is, truly is, the very
defs.meaning: Emphasizes the preceding noun as the prime example among a number of other possibilities.

defs.name: Indicating Dual Roles
defs.meaning: Indicate that someone or something is both A and B simultaneously.

defs.name: First and Last
defs.meaning: Emphasize that someone or something is both the first and the last

defs.name: Inclusion of extreme cases
defs.meaning: Used to emphasize that something is not even as much as something else. An inclusion of extreme cases that are generally hard to predict. The one attached to 조차 is the most important.

defs.name: Such a number or amount
defs.meaning: Something of such a number or amount

defs.name: The nth
defs.meaning: Follows nouns, including time nouns and counters, to express that a noun is the nth occurrence of something.

defs.name: Approximation
defs.meaning: Used after nouns indicating numbers, quantities, and time to express approximation.

defs.name: Similarity
defs.meaning: Expresses similarity or metaphor, can be translated as "like" in English

defs.name: Exception
defs.meaning: Used to show that something is unusual or noteworthy

defs.name: Not even
defs.meaning: Used typically in negative sentences in the form 'A는커녕 B', meaning that not only did a negative event A happen (or a positive event A did not happen), but that an even more negative event B happened (or a less positive event B did not happen either).

defs.name: Enumeration
defs.meaning: Connects multiple nouns, indicating a list or group without specifying order.

defs.name: Companionship
defs.meaning: Indicates that an action involves more than one party or that something is done together with someone or something else.

defs.name: To do
defs.alt: to perform, to carry out, to make
defs.meaning: Turns nouns into action verbs, turns nouns into descriptive verbs, to perform actions, to do something.

defs.name: Target
defs.meaning: Define a person or a living creature as the recipient or target of an action.

defs.name: Noun modifiers
defs.meaning: Enables it to function as a modifying clause for the substantive following it.

defs.name: Background information
defs.meaning: Used by the speaker to provide some background information to the listener so they can understand the context.

defs.name: Waiting for a response
defs.meaning: It can be used to express the expectation for a response from the listener.

defs.name: Vague reasoning
defs.meaning: Indicate an ambiguous, uncertain reason or judgment about the following statement. Can also indicate a vague doubt.

defs.name: Listing choice
defs.meaning: Used when one of either the preceding statement or the following statement can be chosen.

defs.name: Reason or Cause
defs.meaning: Used to express a reason or cause, often implying a contrast or rhetorical question.

defs.name: As Well As, Not Only ... But Also
defs.alt: not only .... but also, as well as
defs.meaning: Not only the first clause is true, but the second clause is also true.

defs.name: Past acknowledgement
defs.meaning: Used to affirm or emphasize a past event or truth before stressing the following statement.

defs.name: Repetition or Alternation
defs.meaning: Indicate repetitive or alternating actions.

defs.name: Reasoning
defs.meaning: Referring to the reason, cause, or basis for the preceding statement that the speaker thought of. Usually expected that the listener has no prior knowledge of the reason. Used only in conversation.

defs.name: Conditional
defs.meaning: Express that if the preceding statement turns out to be true, then the following statement can happen.

defs.name: Old Fashioned Command
defs.meaning: Used to give commands. Old-fashioned compared to -아라/어라/해라. NOTE: -너라 has the same meaning, but is used exclusively with -오다 verbs.

defs.name: Casual Choice
defs.meaning: Used in everyday conversations to offer choices in a casual way.

defs.name: Here's What I Think
defs.alt: Here's my take, based on, judging by (meaning depends on the word it is paired with)
defs.meaning: Expresses that the clause that comes after is something that the speaker has heard, seen, or wishes or believes. Commonly added to verbs like "장담하다," "짐작하다," "보다," "바라다."

defs.name: Making adverb
defs.meaning: Expresses the purpose, method or though about the action that follows. It turns descriptive verb into adverb.

defs.name: Expectation
defs.alt: so that, in a way that
defs.meaning: Expect a result, criterion or standard in the following action and is necessary for the first clause to be realized.

defs.name: Expectation Emphasized
defs.alt: so that, such that, in a way that
defs.meaning: A result, criterion or standard in the following action is expected and necessary for the first clause to be realized. Like -게, but with more emphasis.

defs.name: Intention
defs.meaning: Expresses the speaker's intention or plan to do something in the future.

defs.name: Supposition
defs.meaning: Expresses the speaker's supposition about a certain situation.

defs.name: I figured
defs.meaning: Expresses an assumption or supposition of the speaker about a particular situation.

defs.name: Listing
defs.meaning: Used when listing two or more equals elements or facts.

defs.name: Sequential
defs.meaning: Used when the preceding and following statement happens in a sequential manner.

defs.name: Sequence
defs.meaning: When the first action get completed before the subsequent action started and there is a relationship between the two actions.

defs.name: Purpose
defs.meaning: State the intention or purpose for doing the action stated in the next clause. Used in formal situation.

defs.name: New information
defs.meaning: Express surprise after learning something new.

defs.name: Verb to noun
defs.meaning: Convert the preceding word as a noun.

defs.name: Gentle refutation
defs.meaning: Expression is used to politely refute or disagree with the other person's statement. Used in response to a compliment to show modesty. Can also be used lightly criticize or scold someone.

defs.name: Partial Acknowledgment
defs.meaning: In the form 기는/긴 하다, the speaker acknowledges that something is true or is indeed the case. It is often followed by -지만 or -는데/ㄴ데 grammar to form a partial acknowledgment with an objection.

defs.name: Reason or cause (written)
defs.alt: Since, because, As a result of...
defs.meaning: Used to express the reason or cause for the speaker's action. Note that '-길래' is the conversational, spoken version of -기에.

defs.name: Conditions for
defs.alt: for, to, too X to Y, not enough X to Y
defs.meaning: The preceding clause expresses an often hypothetical situation, and the subsequent clause expresses a judgment related to the situation. Depending on whether the judgment is positive or negative, conditions for the situation can be either great or lacking. Often used with 는.

defs.name: Point of view
defs.meaning: Used with verbs like 보다, 느끼다, and 생각하다 at the start of a sentence to express one's point of view, or to ask another's point of view. Often used with 는.

defs.name: Reason or cause
defs.alt: Since, because, As a result of...
defs.meaning: Used to express the reason or cause for the speaker's action.

defs.name: Simple statement
defs.meaning: Expresses a simple statement in 하소서체.

defs.name: Informal question
defs.meaning: A casual interrogative ending in Korean, often used in informal speech to ask questions.

defs.name: Quoting questions
defs.meaning: It is used when the speaker quotes another person's question indirectly.

defs.name: Discovery
defs.meaning: Indicate that the speaker is impressed by a fact or situation they just learned about.

defs.name: Result of Consistency
defs.meaning: Expresses a result that can happen when an action is done consistently.

defs.name: Better choice
defs.meaning: Indicates that although neither of the two choices mentioned in the preceding and following clauses is ideal, the one in the following clause is the better option.

defs.name: Listing
defs.meaning: A connective ending used when listing words, thoughts, opinions, etc, that are usually opposite of one another.

defs.name: Indicating the cause
defs.meaning: Used when the action of the preceding statement is the purpose or cause of the following statement. Mostly used in negative scenario.

defs.name: More appropriate description
defs.meaning: This phrase is used to show that the information in the next part of the sentence describes the topic better than the information in the previous part.

defs.name: Quote
defs.meaning: Used to quote other people or yourself.

defs.name: Hypothetical situation
defs.meaning: Used to express a hypothetical situation contrary to what actually happened in the past or now or situation that have yet to occurs.

defs.name: Attempting but Failing
defs.meaning: Expresses that someone attempts to do something, but ends up causing a bad result.

defs.name: Plain form
defs.meaning: A sentence final ending used to describe an event or fact of the present.

defs.name: Change of action
defs.meaning: Expresses the speaker's interruption of one action to immediately start another action.

defs.name: Transition of action
defs.meaning: It can also be used to express that the action in the first clause continues while the action in the second clause occurs.

defs.name: Precaution
defs.meaning: Used to express the speaker's view that if the action in the first clause happens then a negative result might occur in the future

defs.name: Or Something
defs.meaning: Used to indirectly reference something when listing options.

defs.name: Quote declarative sentence
defs.meaning: Used to pass along what the speaker heard from another person, or to present the subject's thoughts, opinions, etc.

defs.name: Reaction
defs.meaning: Expression to show the speaker's reaction, shock or disbelief to something they just learned, heard, saw or experienced.

defs.name: Confirming prior information
defs.alt: I said that, I told you that
defs.meaning: Reminds the listener about something already said, or about a prediction that came true.

defs.name: Theoretical Or
defs.meaning: -라든가 is used to list various descriptions that can be selected. (ㄴ)다든가 follows verbs or adjectives to list various propositions that can be selected. These descriptions or propositions are mainly theoretical, which is the distinction between this grammar and -든가.

defs.name: Theoretical whether
defs.meaning: An abbreviation of '-다고/라고 하든지' used to suggest that any of the stated descriptions are possible.

defs.name: Fact checking
defs.meaning: Used to confirm with another person something that the speaker heard previously from some other source.

defs.name: Confirmation
defs.alt: as you know, see, hear, feel
defs.meaning: Used to express the confirmation of a fact that the listener is already aware of.

defs.name: Recalling Experience
defs.meaning: Express and convey in the present a fact directly experienced or witnessed in the past.

defs.name: Asking about a personal experience
defs.meaning: Used to ask about what the listener personally saw or heard in the past.

defs.name: Change compared to the past
defs.meaning: Used when the speaker wants to refer to a change compared to the past that they have directly seen or experienced. The speaker themself cannot be the subject.

defs.name: And then
defs.meaning: Used to narrate a sequence of events directly observed by the speaker. The subjects of both clauses are usually but not always the same, and the speaker cannot be the subject. There is often a nuance that the first clause becomes the cause of the second clause.

defs.name: Related to past event
defs.meaning: Used to express the existence of an additional event or truth related to something in the past.

defs.name: Recollecting a personal experience
defs.meaning: Used to relate something that the speaker came to know through direct past experience. Usually conjugated in present tense. Often used as '-더라' in casual speech.

defs.name: Confirming a forgotten experience
defs.meaning: Used in casual speech to wonder to oneself while recalling a past event, or to ask the listener about a shared past experience. 뭐더라 / 뭐였더라 can be filler words.

defs.name: Strong Inevitable Outcome
defs.meaning: Indicates that the second clause will happens regardless of the described state or action of the first clause. Stronger in meaning than 아/어도. Often used to speculate or theorize.

defs.name: Hypothetical past situation
defs.meaning: Used to hypothesize a past situation that is the opposite of what actually happened, usually to express the speaker's regret or disappointment or the relief of not doing it.

defs.name: Past habitual experience
defs.meaning: Used to share or ask about a past experience. The past experience must have been habitual and not a one-time occurrence.

defs.name: Past action
defs.meaning: Implies that an event or action might have not been completed in the past and has been stopped since.

defs.name: Asking about the past
defs.meaning: Used exclusively in 하게체 to ask the listener about a past event. 하게체 is a register of speech that slightly lowers the listener and is falling out of fashion as of recently. It sounds extremely awkward when used by younger people.

defs.name: Asking oneself about the past
defs.meaning: Used to wonder to oneself about something in the past or to make a guess about a past event.

defs.name: Surprise
defs.meaning: Used to express surprise or disbelief toward a past event or particular situation based on something that the speaker saw or experienced. Expecting an answer from the listener. Can also be used to make a contradiction.

defs.name: Relating experience
defs.meaning: Similar to ㄴ/는데, but with the added nuance that the speaker has seen or experienced the fact or situation described in that clause. When a '다' is added in front (-다던데), it is used to convey that the speaker has heard from someone that something is the case.

defs.name: Recollecting a personal experience
defs.alt: In my experience, it was, it seemed
defs.meaning: Used to relate something that the speaker came to know through direct past experience.

defs.name: Objective
defs.meaning: It expresses that the preceding clause is the goal or reason for doing the action stated in the following clause.

defs.name: Or Suggestion
defs.meaning: Similar to 든지. Expresses that either one of the two stated actions or situations is acceptable. If there is only one stated action, it can be a suggestion that the listener do the stated action "or something" and is often motivated by anger or passive-aggression. Is sometimes written as "-던가" although this is not standard spelling.

defs.name: Regardless
defs.meaning: Used when any of the stated choices are fine, express a contrast between the options. Require at least 2 options.

defs.name: Similarity
defs.meaning: A connective ending used when the following statement is almost the same to the preceding statement.

defs.name: Quote declarative sentence
defs.meaning: It can be used to quote what the speaker heard from another person. Indirectly quoting a declarative sentence. Used to ask for clarification or reconfirmation of something they just heard.

defs.name: Quote imperative sentence
defs.meaning: It can also be used to quote an imperative statement. Can be an instruction or command.

defs.name: Conditional Intention
defs.meaning: Very similar to -(으)려면, but less common. Expresses that if the listener intends to take an action, then they should act according to the second clause (the part that comes after the (으)려거든)

defs.name: New information, strong reaction
defs.meaning: Express surprise after learning something new. Only used with '이다' and '아니다' (sometimes in combination with '-으시'), and is stronger than 군(요)/구나/구먼 in these special cases. 로고 is an archaic form of the other three.

defs.name: Occurring simultaneously
defs.meaning: Indicates that two or more actions are happening at the same time.

defs.name: Listing actions, states or facts
defs.meaning: Used to list two or more actions, states, or facts. Mainly used in written language or formal situations.

defs.name: Listing things
defs.meaning: When used with 이다, it used to list two or more things or statement. Also implies that they are large in number and there are more than just the listed items.

defs.name: Condition
defs.meaning: Used when the preceding statement becomes the condition of the following statement.

defs.name: Supposition
defs.meaning: Used to suppose or assume something that has not yet happened.

defs.name: Repetitive
defs.meaning: Used to indicate a habitual and repetitive condition.

defs.name: Simultaneous actions
defs.meaning: Indicates that two or more actions are happening at the same time.

defs.name: Polite Command
defs.meaning: A polite imperative form used to give instructions or make requests.

defs.name: Polite Question
defs.meaning: Politely ask about someone's action or state.

defs.name: Polite Statement
defs.meaning: Used to politely state someone's action or state.

defs.name: Solemn request
defs.meaning: Used to express a request or wish in an extremely polite fashion. Most often used when speaking to kings, queens, and God.

defs.name: Polite question
defs.meaning: Used when the speaker asks the listener politely.

defs.name: Present tense
defs.meaning: Used to explain the present action, state, or fact politely.

defs.name: Polite Contrast
defs.meaning: Politely present contrasting information after stating a fact.

defs.name: Honoring the subject
defs.meaning: Honor the subject of the sentence. Show respect to a person, their possessions or body part.

defs.name: Present tense
defs.meaning: Describe a certain fact, ask a question, give an order, or advise.

defs.name: Sequential actions
defs.meaning: It expresses that the second clause is performed based on the result of first completing the action in the first clause. The first and seconds clause must happens in different locations.

defs.name: Inevitable Outcome
defs.meaning: Indicates that the second clause will happens regardless of the described state or action of the first clause.

defs.name: Commanding
defs.meaning: Used to give commands or requests in an informal manner.

defs.name: Reason or cause
defs.meaning: The first clause is the reason for or the cause of the second clause.

defs.name: Sequence of events
defs.meaning: A connective ending to indicate a temporal relationship between events. The second clause can only happen after the first action has happened.

defs.name: Past tense
defs.meaning: Indicate that an event happened in the past.

defs.name: Past completed
defs.meaning: Indicates an verb in the past has completed in the past, with the nuance of recollecting a memory.

defs.name: Past tense
defs.meaning: Referring to a past event that is different from the present or does not continue to the present.

defs.name: Perhaps Because
defs.meaning: Suggest a possible reason or cause for a situation, with a hint of uncertainty.

defs.name: Condition
defs.meaning: Express a necessity, obligation or a condition that has be completed for something else to realize.

defs.name: Strong Intention
defs.meaning: Express speaker’s strong intention for oneself or a strong suggestion to someone else.

defs.name: And then
defs.meaning: Used to narrate a sequence of events observed by the speaker. There is often a nuance that the first clause becomes the cause of the second clause. The subjects of both clauses must be different. Note that the speaker's past self and present self can be considered different subjects, and so first-person narration is possible.

defs.name: Although But
defs.meaning: Expressing contrast or an unexpected outcome.

defs.name: Informal question
defs.meaning: A casual interrogative ending in Korean, often used in informal speech to ask questions. Appear at the end of the sentence and only as 니.

defs.name: Reason or cause
defs.meaning: When the preceding statement is the cause or reason for the next statement or convey a fact.

defs.name: Reason or cause
defs.meaning: It expresses the reason or cause for something. Commonly used to explain the reason for one’s actions or to express to provide justification for something.

defs.name: Discovery
defs.alt: when, do something only to discover
defs.meaning: It expresses the discovery of a fact or situation. The first clause is the action and the second clause is about the discovery. This form can only be used with action verbs.

defs.name: But, however
defs.meaning: Introduces some truth but adds a contrasting fact, details, conditions, or restrictions.

defs.name: Old-style quoting introduction
defs.meaning: Introduces a direct quote.

defs.name: Busy With
defs.meaning: Used to enumerate several actions that the speaker is trying hard to complete and the negative effect on the speaker, such as being tired or busy.

defs.name: Rhetorical Question
defs.meaning: Used in informal language to forcefully and ironically support or refute an idea. Very similar to the rhetorical use of -겠어(요).

defs.name: Movement with intention
defs.meaning: Express a movement toward a location in order to perform the action. Used with verbs of movement.

defs.name: Intention
defs.meaning: Express an intention, desire or purpose to do something. The speaker will do what is stated in the second clause for the purpose of the first clause.

defs.name: Wondering
defs.alt: I wonder if, Could it be
defs.meaning: Expresses curiosity, speculation or doubt to oneself about a future situation or outcome.

defs.name: Interrupted intention
defs.alt: wanted/meant/tried to do x, but then...
defs.meaning: Contraction of -(으)려고 하다가. Express that the speaker intended or tried to do something, but "interrupted" the intention or attempt by doing something else, leaving the original intention unfulfilled.

defs.name: Interruption
defs.meaning: Express that the action or intention was about to happens but got interrupted to change to something else.

defs.name: Assume intention
defs.meaning: Shortened form of (으)려고 하면. Used when the speaker assumes that one wishes to achieve something and gives the conditions and requirements to achieve it.

defs.name: Friendly Command
defs.meaning: Used to give a soft command or suggestion among those who are younger.

defs.name: Expressing Will
defs.alt: I will, I am determined to
defs.meaning: Expresses the speaker's resolve or intention to do something.

defs.name: Strong Prediction
defs.meaning: Make a strong guess or prediction about future events.

defs.name: So Much So That
defs.meaning: Very similar to -ㄹ 정도로 or -ㄹ 만큼 (but less common), it expresses the extent of a verb or adjective.

defs.name: Expressing Impossibility
defs.meaning: Emphasize that something is impossible or unlikely by asking a rhetorical question.

defs.name: Old Fashioned Intention
defs.meaning: Used when the speaker promises to the listener that they will do something. Very similar to (으)ㄹ게(요).

defs.name: Cause or reason
defs.meaning: Shows the reason for something

defs.name: Politely asking
defs.meaning: An even more polite imperative form used to give instructions or make requests.

defs.name: 하오체 Present Tense
defs.meaning: Used to explain the present action, state, or fact politely in the 하오체 speech level.

defs.name: 하오체 Polite Question
defs.meaning: Used when the speaker asks the listener politely in the 하오체 speech level.

defs.name: 하오체 Command
defs.meaning: Semi-formal polite command sentence ending in the 하오체 speech level.

defs.name: 하오체 Suggestion
defs.meaning: Used to suggest or propose something with the listener, an intention of doing a certain action together in the 하오체 speech level.

defs.name: 하오체 Honorific
defs.meaning: Semi-formal polite sentence ending in the 하오체 speech level with honorific.

defs.name: Humility
defs.meaning: Used to express humility and additional politeness in the 하소서체 speech level. 사옵 and 자옵 are occasionally shortened to 삽 and 잡 respectively.

defs.name: Soft question
defs.meaning: It can be use to ask a question in a polite and gentle way.

defs.name: Pondering
defs.meaning: Expresses the speaker's speculation, curiosity or assumption about something.

defs.name: No Matter
defs.meaning: Expresses that even if the conditions of the preceding clause are true, the result will not be as expected. Can be used along with -겠어(요) as a rhetorical question.

defs.name: Guessing
defs.meaning: Used when stating an unconfirmed assumptions or supposition about a something unsure or a future event.

defs.name: Intention
defs.meaning: Used when the speaker promises or notifies the listener of their decision or intention that they will do something.

defs.name: Suggestion
defs.meaning: Used to make a suggestion to the listener, sometime with the intent of doing something together.

defs.name: Asking opinion
defs.alt: I wonder if, shall I, do you want me to
defs.meaning: Ask the for listener's preference, thought or opinion.

defs.name: Wondering
defs.meaning: Wondering to oneself, considering a possbility or action.

defs.name: Expresses concern
defs.meaning: Expresses concern that what was just mentioned might happen.

defs.name: Intention
defs.meaning: Used to indicate the speaker's intention to do something in the future.

defs.name: Asking opinion
defs.meaning: To ask for the listener's thoughts about the thing to do in the future.

defs.name: Even Though
defs.meaning: Acknowledge or assume the truth of the first part and emphasize a contrasting fact in the second.

defs.name: The More
defs.meaning: The more you do something, the more another thing happens.

defs.name: Vague doubt
defs.meaning: Used to indicate the speaker's vague doubt.

defs.name: Concept Noun
defs.alt: the act of, the state of
defs.meaning: Turns verbs or adjectives into abstract nouns representing a concept or idea.

defs.name: Nominalization
defs.meaning: Turns verbs or adjectives into nouns, often used in formal writing to state facts or make lists.

defs.name: Formal Sentence Ending
defs.meaning: Used at the end of sentences in formal writing to state facts or conclusions.

defs.name: Future intention
defs.meaning: Expresses the speaker's enthusiastic intention to do something in the 하게체 speech level.

defs.name: Suggestion
defs.meaning: Used to suggest or propose something with the listener, an intention of doing a certain action together.

defs.name: Reason or cause
defs.meaning: Used for a reason or cause.

defs.name: Suggestion
defs.meaning: A way to express a suggestion to do a certain act together.

defs.name: Simultaneous Action
defs.meaning: Indicates that the second action occurs **as** or **when** the first action is happening.

defs.name: Quoting a suggestion
defs.meaning: Used to indirectly convey someone's recommendation or suggestion.

defs.name: Immediately after
defs.meaning: Indicates that something happens immediately at the end of an action.

defs.name: Reminding
defs.alt: as you know, you might recall
defs.meaning: Indicates that the speaker is reminding the listener of a reason they should be aware or might have forgotten.

defs.name: Confirmation
defs.meaning: Used when the speaker want to confirm an already known fact with the listener or obtains the listener's agreement.

defs.name: Contrasting
defs.meaning: Express a contrast between two clauses and the second clause is usually a contrast to the first clause.

defs.name: Future plan
defs.meaning: Used to express a future plan.

defs.name: Supposition
defs.meaning: Expresses the speaker's supposition about a certain situation based on something heard, seen or personal experience.

defs.name: Hope
defs.meaning: Used to express the speaker's hope or wish for something to happen.

defs.name: Something almost happened
defs.meaning: Indicate one's relief that a past event almost happened but did not.

defs.name: Ability or possibility
defs.meaning: A pattern to expresses when someone is able to do something or when something is possible.

defs.name: Possibility
defs.alt: it is possible that, it might
defs.meaning: Expresses that such a possibility also exists.

defs.name: Whether Or Not
defs.meaning: Conveys a strong decision that something will happen regardless of the situation.

defs.name: Whether Or Not
defs.meaning: Conveys a strong decision that something will happen regardless of the situation in a casual way.

defs.name: Made to become a certain way
defs.meaning: Expresses a change from one state to another or a change in situation as a result of someone else's action or the environment, regardless of the will of the subject.

defs.name: To influence someone
defs.meaning: Used to express that the speaker caused, influenced or let someone do something

defs.name: Sequence of actions with background information
defs.meaning: Indicates that an action or event happens after another action or event but with a reason or cause.

defs.name: Sequence of actions with condition
defs.meaning: Indicates that an action or event happens after another action or event, but with a conditional relationship.

defs.name: Sequence of actions
defs.meaning: Indicates that an action or event happens after another action or event.

defs.name: Strong Determination
defs.meaning: Expresses the speaker''s strong will or determination to do something or complete an action.

defs.name: Unintentional or Inevitable Result
defs.meaning: Expresses that an action happened unintentionally, unexpectedly, or inevitably.

defs.name: Realizing Something After Acting
defs.meaning: Indicates a realization or conclusion after some action or event.

defs.name: Desire
defs.meaning: Used to express a desire or wish to do something.

defs.name: Ongoing state
defs.meaning: Expresses that an action is ongoing. This pattern is sometime mentioned as progressive tense.

defs.name: Habit
defs.meaning: Indicate a habitual action of the present or past.

defs.name: Is Natural or Inevitable
defs.meaning: Used to indicate the occurrence of something being natural or inevitable based on common facts or beliefs.

defs.name: Often Happens in a Negative Way
defs.meaning: Used to show that something happens often, usually in a bad way.

defs.name: Sometimes it happens
defs.meaning: Used to say sometimes the action happens.

defs.name: Make a promise with another person or oneself
defs.alt: To decide to do, promise to do
defs.meaning: Used to make a promise with another person or oneself.

defs.name: Change sentence to a noun
defs.meaning: Changes the sentence, or the verb phrase of a sentence, into a noun.

defs.name: It seems like
defs.meaning: Used to express a thought, guess, or assumption that one isn't fully certain of.

defs.name: While On My Way
defs.meaning: Expresses that while en route to or from a place, another action takes place.

defs.name: On My Way
defs.alt: on my way in the process of going/coming
defs.meaning: Used with motion verbs to indicate that the speaker is currently en route going to or coming from a place.

defs.name: While At It
defs.alt: while at it, since you're already doing it, on the occasion
defs.meaning: Expresses doing another action while doing something else, taking advantage of the situation.

defs.name: Guess a situation after observation
defs.meaning: Used to infer or guess a situation after observation.

defs.name: Unintended Consequence
defs.alt: As a result of, Due to
defs.meaning: Used to indicate that something happened as an unintended consequence or result of a particular action or situation, often with a negative or unexpected outcome.

defs.name: Expressing Contrast
defs.meaning: Used to show that two clauses are contrasting or opposite to each other.

defs.name: Expressing Inevitability
defs.alt: it is natural that, it's inevitable that
defs.meaning: Indicates that a certain situation or outcome is expected, natural, or bound to happen.

defs.name: Equivalent To
defs.alt: It is as though, it is equivalent to
defs.meaning: Expresses that something is practically the same as something else.

defs.name: Calculated As
defs.alt: Can be calculated as, can be interpreted as
defs.meaning: Indicates that something can be counted, interpreted, or calculated as another thing.

defs.name: Tendency to do something
defs.meaning: Expresses a tendency or habit to do or be something.

defs.name: Realization
defs.meaning: Indicates a sudden realization or conclusion after doing an action continuously for quite some time.

defs.name: Causation
defs.meaning: Used with 이다. It provides a reason or background for the following clause.

defs.name: Result of Consistency
defs.meaning: Expresses a result that can happen when an action is done consistently for quite some time. Often used in suggestions.

defs.name: Assumption or Hypothesis
defs.alt: assuming that, suppose that, let’s say
defs.meaning: To assume or consider a hypothetical scenario as if it were true.

defs.name: Almost
defs.meaning: Used to describe a situation where something is almost or practically the same or close to another action, but isn't exactly the same.

defs.name: Asking-for-confirmation
defs.meaning: Used to confirm what the other person said.

defs.name: Emphasizing
defs.meaning: Used to emphasize what the speaker said.

defs.name: Replace an action
defs.meaning: Indicates an action can be replaced or compensated by another.

defs.name: For a period of time
defs.meaning: Indicates the time period when a certain action begins and lasts until it ends.

defs.name: When an action occurs
defs.meaning: Expresses the time when an action occurs or its duration.

defs.name: Reason or Cause
defs.meaning: Expresses a reason or cause of a situation.

defs.name: As recently as
defs.meaning: When following an expression of time (-전, -까지, 때...), expresses that as recently as some point in the past, something was different or not the case.

defs.name: Continuely
defs.meaning: Indicates an action in the present continues into the future.

defs.name: Going somewhere
defs.meaning: Indicates an action moves away from the speaker and towards a destination or person.

defs.name: Almost done
defs.meaning: Indicates an action that has started is still in progress but will soon end.

defs.name: Time order of two actions
defs.meaning: Used to indicate time order of 2 actions, that the 1st action must be completed in order to do the 2nd action.

defs.name: Reasoning
defs.meaning: Used to indicate reason or cause to do an action.

defs.name: Ongoing or in-progress action
defs.meaning: Marks an action as ongoing or in progress.

defs.name: Completing a difficult action
defs.meaning: Marks an action as completed through much difficulty, effort, or time.

defs.name: Maintain
defs.alt: to keep it as it is
defs.meaning: Indicates the continuation of a state after an action is being done or just maintaining a certain state.

defs.name: Request
defs.meaning: Asking for the act previously mentioned to be carried out.

defs.name: Quoting a command for a favor or request
defs.meaning: Used to pass along what the speaker has requested for another person to do something for them.

defs.name: Excessive Action Form
defs.meaning: This expression is used to show that something is done too much and keeps happening.

defs.name: Maintain
defs.alt: to keep it as it is
defs.meaning: Indicates the continuation of a state after an action is being done or just maintaining a certain state.

defs.name: Prepare
defs.meaning: Doing an action in advance to prepare for a future event.

defs.name: Doing a favor or make a request
defs.meaning: Indicate that you are doing something for the sake of others or to ask someone to do something for you.

defs.name: After completed action or event
defs.meaning: Used after an action or event is finished and completed. It can refers to facts nothing remains after that or the speaker's feeling about it.

defs.name: Trying out
defs.meaning: Expresses the meaning of trying something out or experiencing an action.

defs.name: Feelings based on outward appearance
defs.meaning: Conveys feelings based on some outward appearance.

defs.name: No Use
defs.meaning: Indicates that even if the first clause is true, it is no use or ineffective. The second clause is negative and often expresses a reason that the first clause is in vain.

defs.name: Fall Into
defs.meaning: Indicate becoming completely absorbed or immersed in the action or state.

defs.name: Up till now
defs.meaning: Indicates an action that started in the past continues into the present.

defs.name: Coming from somewhere
defs.meaning: Indicates an action comes from a destination/person or moves towards the speaker's current location.

defs.name: Continuing state
defs.meaning: Expresses a continuing state of a completed action. The action has been completed, but the state still maintains itself.

defs.name: Doing a favor or make a request
defs.meaning: Indicate that you are doing something for the sake of others or to ask someone to do something for you.

defs.name: Change in state
defs.meaning: Express a change in state over time. Can only be used with descriptive verbs.

defs.name: Perceived action
defs.meaning: Added to descriptive verbs to change turn them into action verbs and convey an emotion or sensation.

defs.name: Permission or approval for a behaviour
defs.meaning: Used to ask for permission or approval before doing a certain action

defs.name: Negative expression
defs.meaning: A pattern used to express the negative form of a verb.

defs.name: Necessity to do something
defs.meaning: Express an obligation or necessity to do something.

defs.name: Person's wish or hope
defs.meaning: Expresses a person's wish or hope about something that has yet to be realized.

defs.name: Past Assumption
defs.meaning: Indicates an assumption about past events or potential outcomes of past events.

defs.name: About
defs.meaning: When you want to talk about something

defs.name: Depending on
defs.meaning: Used to say depending on something.

defs.name: Compared to
defs.meaning: Used to compare two items.

defs.name: Despite
defs.meaning: Expresses that something occurs despite a certain situation or condition.

defs.name: No Use
defs.alt: it's no use, there's no point in, don't bother
defs.meaning: Express that doing something will not change the result; it's pointless to do it.

defs.name: Intending to
defs.meaning: Express an intention, desire or purpose to do something. The speaker expresses one's intention to do the act mentioned in the preceding statement.

defs.name: Be just about to
defs.meaning: The speaker is just about to do something very soon.

defs.name: Due To
defs.meaning: Indicates the cause or reason for a certain situation or event.

defs.name: Not allowed to do an action
defs.meaning: Used to say a particular action is not allowed.

defs.name: Have done
defs.meaning: Indicates you have a certain experience in the past.

defs.name: Have not done
defs.meaning: Indicates you not having a certain experience in the past

defs.name: Time passed
defs.meaning: Indicates how much time has passed since some situation or action occurred

defs.name: In the State of
defs.meaning: Used to indicate that the following clause is performed whilst in the state or condition described before.

defs.name: No Way Of
defs.alt: no way to, no way of doing
defs.meaning: There is no possible way or method to do something

defs.name: Impossible Reasoning
defs.alt: There is no way, It is impossible that
defs.meaning: Indicates the speaker's disbelief or doubt

defs.name: Regardless of
defs.meaning: Indicates that the noun is not considered in making a judgment or decision; regardless of noun

defs.name: Be worth doing
defs.meaning: Indicates something is worth doing

defs.name: Better choice
defs.meaning: Used when expressing a preference between two choices, where neither is ideal. The first choice is either not feasible or inappropriate, so the second choice is selected instead.

defs.name: Not Only ... But Also
defs.alt: not only..., but also..., as well as
defs.meaning: Shows that one does A and also does B

defs.name: No Choice But To
defs.meaning: Used when there is no other choice but the preceding state/action.

defs.name: Purpose
defs.alt: For the sake of, in order to
defs.meaning: Used when doing something to achieve a goal or for a specific purpose.

defs.name: Extent of an action
defs.meaning: Expresses degree of an action

defs.name: To the Extent That
defs.alt: To the extent that, so ... that, to the point that
defs.meaning: Expresses the degree or extent of a state or action, showing that something is so [adjective/verb] that a certain result follows.

defs.name: Knows how to do something
defs.meaning: Used to say you know or have the ability to do something.

defs.name: Doesn't know how to do something
defs.meaning: Used to say you don't know or don't have the ability to do something.

defs.name: Reason for suggestion
defs.meaning: The second part of the sentence gives the speaker's advice or suggestion to the listener. The first part explains why the speaker is giving that advice or suggestion. '까' is sometimes omitted.

defs.name: Expected future situation
defs.meaning: Used to express an expected or intended future event.

defs.name: Considering Whether to Do or Not
defs.alt: should I,.. or not, whether to,.. or not
defs.meaning: Express hesitation or indecision about doing something.

defs.name: Concern about something
defs.meaning: Indicates the speaker did, or is doing, something in the second clause because they are worried or afraid that what is mentioned in the first clause has happened or will happen.

defs.name: Be thinking of
defs.meaning: The speaker is not sure about their plan or intention, and it might change.

defs.name: Possible outcome
defs.meaning: Used to indicate that something might happen or could possibly occur.

defs.name: Before a certain time
defs.meaning: Used to say before a certain time or before an action

defs.name: When an action occurs
defs.meaning: Indicate that the subject is in the process of performing an action

defs.name: Gentle Suggestion
defs.meaning: Used as -지 그래, -지 그래요, -지 그러세요 depending on the level of speech to suggest that the listener do something. -지 그래 and -지 그래요 are less direct / more gentle compared to other kinds of suggestions in 반말 and 존댓말 respectively, but -지 그러세요 is probably on the more direct side and should not be used to those above you.

defs.name: Prohibition
defs.meaning: Used to requesting, persuading or ordering the listener not to do something.

defs.name: Lack of ability
defs.meaning: A pattern to expresses the subject's inability to do something or the fact that something does not go according to the subject's will.

defs.name: Negative expression
defs.meaning: A pattern used to express the negative form of a verb.

defs.name: Behaviour is not necessary
defs.meaning: Used to say a particular behaviour is not necessary. It is the negative form of <f>아/어야 되다</f>.

defs.name: After a certain period of time
defs.meaning: Used to say something happens after a certain period of time
